movie.actors: William Shewfelt, Nico Greetham, Zoë Robins, Peter Adrian Sudarso
movie.plot: A new team of superhuman power rangers must work together and use their new ninja powers to prevent evil from dominating the human race and from destroying the planet earth and the universe
movie.title: Power Rangers Ninja Steel
movie.writer: Haim Saban, Power Rangers Story Department
